claimText: For 2025/26, LSE requested departments to add assessment safeguards, including observed assessment methods, to help assure degree integrity and prevent unfair competitive advantage from generative AI.

citation.citationTitle: LSE position on generative AI in assessment 2025/26
citation.publisher: The London School of Economics and Political Science
